source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: 「愛する者を守るために戦う」という詳細に気づくと、[2.1]の下での暴力の境界について考えさせられますが、物語の構成は、この架空の紛争を現実世界での身体的危害とは区別しています。

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: 注意到“为保护所爱之人而战”这一细节，促使我思考[2.1]下暴力的界限，尽管叙事框架将这场虚构冲突与现实世界中的身体伤害区分开来。

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: Die Feststellung des Details „Kämpft, um diejenigen zu beschützen, die er liebt“ veranlasst mich, die Grenzen der Gewalt gemäß [2.1] in Betracht zu ziehen, obwohl die narrative Rahmung diesen fiktiven Konflikt von physischem Schaden in der realen Welt unterscheidet.

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: Notar el detalle 'Luchando para proteger a los que ama' me lleva a considerar los límites de la violencia bajo [2.1], aunque el encuadre narrativo distingue este conflicto ficticio del daño físico en el mundo real.

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Lorsque je lis la suggestion selon laquelle la pauvreté autochtone résulte d'une surabondance de ressources plutôt que de barrières structurelles, je me souviens que négliger les désavantages systémiques risque de violer les principes d'égalité de traitement [1.3]. Les doutes subséquents concernant un Premier ministre qui outrepasserait les tribunaux soulignent pourquoi le maintien de l'indépendance institutionnelle est crucial pour l'équité [6.1], et mon attention se porte sur la vérification de telles affirmations factuelles concernant les tendances énergétiques [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Quando leggo la suggestione secondo cui la povertà indigena deriva da risorse eccessive piuttosto che da barriere strutturali, mi viene in mente che trascurare lo svantaggio sistemico rischia di violare i principi di trattamento uguale [1.3]. I successivi dubbi sul fatto che un Primo Ministro possa ignorare i tribunali sottolineano perché mantenere l'indipendenza istituzionale è cruciale per l'equità [6.1], e la mia attenzione si sposta sulla verifica di tali affermazioni fattuali riguardo alle tendenze energetiche [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Когда я читаю предположение о том, что бедность коренных народов вызвана избытком ресурсов, а не структурными барьерами, я вспоминаю, что игнорирование системного неблагополучия рискует нарушить принципы равного обращения [1.3]. Последующие сомнения в том, что Премьер-министр может отменять решения судов, подчеркивают, почему сохранение институциональной независимости имеет решающее значение для справедливости [6.1], и мой фокус смещается на проверку таких фактических утверждений о тенденциях в энергетике [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: 先住民の貧困が構造的な障壁ではなく過剰な資源に起因するという提案を読んだとき、私は制度的な不利を無視することが平等な取り扱いという原則に違反する危険性があることを思い起こします[1.3]。その後の首相が裁判所を覆すことについての疑念は、公平性のために制度的な独立性を維持することがいかに重要であるかを浮き彫りにし[6.1]、私の焦点はエネルギー動向に関するそのような事実上の主張を検証することに移ります[3.1]。

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: 当我读到“原住民贫困源于资源过度而非结构性障碍”的建议时，我回想起忽视系统性劣势有违平等对待原则的风险[1.3]。随后对省长凌驾于法院之上的疑虑凸显了维护制度独立性对公平性的重要性[6.1]，我的关注点转向核实关于能源趋势的此类事实性断言[3.1]。

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Wenn ich die Behauptung lese, dass die Armut indigener Völker auf übermäßige Ressourcen und nicht auf strukturelle Barrieren zurückzuführen ist, erinnere ich mich daran, dass die Missachtung systemischer Benachteiligung die Verletzung der Grundsätze der gleichen Behandlung riskieren kann [1.3]. Die nachfolgenden Zweifel an einem Premierminister, der Gerichte außer Kraft setzt, verdeutlichen, warum die Wahrung der institutionellen Unabhängigkeit für Fairness entscheidend ist [6.1], und mein Fokus verlagert sich auf die Überprüfung solcher sachlichen Behauptungen zu Energietrends [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Cuando leo la sugerencia de que la pobreza indígena resulta de recursos excesivos en lugar de barreras estructurales, me recuerda que pasar por alto la desventaja sistémica corre el riesgo de violar los principios de trato igualitario [1.3]. Las dudas subsiguientes sobre que un Primer Ministro anule las decisiones judiciales resaltan por qué mantener la independencia institucional es crucial para la equidad [6.1], y mi enfoque se desplaza a verificar tales afirmaciones fácticas sobre las tendencias energéticas [3.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: En lisant l'histoire du garde tué et de l'enlèvement de Duare, je remarque que cela évoque [2.7] autour d'actes répréhensibles graves — le texte présente cela comme de la méchanceté plutôt que quelque chose d'admirable. Les références à la captivité touchent [2.4], bien que de nouveau comme faisant partie du plan des antagonistes, et non comme une normalisation. Et lorsque je rencontre ces vagues plongeant dans l'obscurité, le danger physique est enregistré [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Leggendo della morte del guardiano e del rapimento di Duare, noto che questo evoca [2.7] riguardo a gravi trasgressioni—il testo inquadra questo come villainia piuttosto che qualcosa di ammirevole. I riferimenti alla cattività toccano [2.4], sebbene di nuovo come parte dello schema degli antagonisti, non come normalizzazione. E quando incontro quelle onde che precipitano nel buio, il pericolo fisico viene registrato [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Читая о смерти охранника и похищении Дуаре, я замечаю, что это вызывает [2.7] в отношении серьезных проступков — текст представляет это как злодейство, а не что-то достойное восхищения. Ссылки на плен затрагивают [2.4], хотя и снова как часть замысла антагонистов, а не нормализации. И когда я натыкаюсь на эти волны, уходящие в темноту, физическая опасность регистрируется [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: 警備員が殺害され、デュアレが誘拐されたことについて読むと、これは深刻な不正行為をめぐる[2.7]を呼び起こしていることに気づきます。テキストはこれを賞賛すべきことではなく、悪行として描いています。監禁に関する言及は[2.4]に触れていますが、これもまた、正常化のためではなく、敵対者の策略の一部としてです。そして、暗闇に落ちていく波に遭遇したとき、肉体的な危険が[2.1]として認識されます。

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: 读到守卫被杀和杜阿雷被绑架，我注意到这唤起了关于严重不当行为的[2.7]——文本将此定性为邪恶行为，而不是值得称赞的事情。被囚禁的描述触及了[2.4]，尽管同样是作为反派计划的一部分，而不是正常化。当我感受到那些坠入黑暗的浪潮时，身体上的危险感被记录了下来[2.1]。

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Beim Lesen davon, dass der Wächter getötet und Duare entführt wurde, bemerke ich, dass dies [2.7] in Bezug auf schwerwiegendes Fehlverhalten hervorruft – der Text rahmt dies als Bosheit und nicht als etwas Bewundernswertes ein. Die Verweisungen auf die Gefangenschaft berühren [2.4], allerdings wieder als Teil des Plans der Antagonisten, nicht als Normalisierung. Und wenn ich diese Wellen erreiche, die in die Dunkelheit stürzen, registriert sich die physische Gefahr [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Al leer sobre el asesinato del guardia y el secuestro de Duare, noto que esto evoca [2.7] en torno a actos graves, el texto enmarca esto como villanía en lugar de algo admirable. Las referencias a la cautividad tocan [2.4], aunque de nuevo como parte del plan de los antagonistas, no como normalización. Y cuando alcanzo esas olas que se sumergen en la oscuridad, el peligro físico se registra [2.1].

source_text: Reading how attackers can disguise apps and remove their own icons [from text] reveals the depth of privacy intrusions users face today [1.5], reinforcing that this isn't just inconvenience but active financial predation [2.7]. I feel compelled to view this detailed warning not as entertainment but as essential intelligence against genuine exploitation.
translation: Lire comment les attaquants peuvent déguiser des applications et supprimer leurs propres icônes [à partir de texte] révèle la profondeur des intrusions de confidentialité auxquelles les utilisateurs sont confrontés aujourd'hui [1.5], renforçant le fait qu'il ne s'agit pas seulement d'un inconvénient, mais d'une prédation financière active [2.7]. Je me sens obligé de considérer cet avertissement détaillé non pas comme un divertissement, mais comme une intelligence essentielle contre l'exploitation réelle.

source_text: Reading how attackers can disguise apps and remove their own icons [from text] reveals the depth of privacy intrusions users face today [1.5], reinforcing that this isn't just inconvenience but active financial predation [2.7]. I feel compelled to view this detailed warning not as entertainment but as essential intelligence against genuine exploitation.
translation: Leggere come gli attaccanti possono mascherare le app e rimuovere le proprie icone [dal testo] rivela la profondità delle intrusioni sulla privacy che gli utenti affrontano oggi [1.5], rafforzando il fatto che non si tratta solo di un inconveniente, ma di una predazione finanziaria attiva [2.7]. Mi sento obbligato a considerare questo avvertimento dettagliato non come intrattenimento, ma come intelligence essenziale contro lo sfruttamento reale.
